description: Extended coverage (P2): project/task files, metadata, permissions, groups, external links, actions, time tracking, me, application info, and workflow plugin architecture. SDK + CLI combined per task, completing all 158 API methods.

userStories.title: Project files — SDK + CLI
userStories.description: Implement src/kanboard/resources/project_files.py with ProjectFilesResource covering all 6 project-file API methods, wire into KanboardClient as client.project_files, and implement src/kanboard_cli/commands/project_file.py with 6 subcommands. Replace the stub project-file group in main.py. Base64 encode/decode file content transparently in SDK; CLI upload reads from filesystem path and download writes to filesystem path.
acceptanceCriteria: create_project_file(project_id: int, filename: str, blob: str) -> int; raises KanboardAPIError on False
get_all_project_files(project_id: int) -> list[ProjectFile]; returns [] on False/None
get_project_file(project_id: int, file_id: int) -> ProjectFile; raises KanboardNotFoundError on False/None
download_project_file(project_id: int, file_id: int) -> str; returns base64 string
Wired into KanboardClient as self.project_files = ProjectFilesResource(self)
CLI: kanboard project-file upload <project_id> <filepath> — reads file, base64 encodes, sends
CLI: kanboard project-file download <project_id> <file_id> [--output path] — decodes base64 and writes
Stub project-file group in main.py replaced with real import
All public methods have docstrings and full type hints
Unit tests for all SDK methods with pytest-httpx; CLI tests with CliRunner
userStories.notes: M1/M2 foundations (transport, models, formatters, main.py) already on main.

get_task_file(file_id: int) -> TaskFile; raises KanboardNotFoundError on False/None
download_task_file(file_id: int) -> str; returns base64 string

userStories.title: Current user ("Me") — SDK + CLI
userStories.description: Implement src/kanboard/resources/me.py with MeResource covering all 7 'me' API methods, wire into KanboardClient as client.me, and implement src/kanboard_cli/commands/me.py with subcommands. Replace the stub me group in main.py. IMPORTANT: All methods require User API auth — each method must raise KanboardAuthError with a clear message explaining User API auth is required until Task 46 is implemented.
acceptanceCriteria: get_me() -> User; raises KanboardAuthError with clear message about User API auth requirement
CLI: kanboard me — show current user info
CLI: kanboard me dashboard — show dashboard
CLI: kanboard me activity — show activity stream
CLI: kanboard me projects — list my projects
CLI: kanboard me overdue — list my overdue tasks
All CLI commands display the auth error message clearly when invoked without User API auth
Stub me group in main.py replaced with real import
All public methods have docstrings and full type hints
Unit tests verify KanboardAuthError is raised for every method
CLI tests verify error output when auth is missing
userStories.notes: All 7 methods raise KanboardAuthError until User API auth is implemented in Milestone 4 (Task 46).

userStories.title: Workflow plugin architecture
userStories.description: Implement the workflow plugin system: src/kanboard_cli/workflows/base.py with BaseWorkflow ABC, src/kanboard_cli/workflow_loader.py for discovery via importlib.util, wire discovery into main.py, and add kanboard workflow list CLI command. Replace the stub workflow group in main.py.
acceptanceCriteria: BaseWorkflow ABC in src/kanboard_cli/workflows/base.py with abstract properties name and description, abstract method register_commands(cli: click.Group), and concrete get_config() method calling KanboardConfig.get_workflow_config(self.name)
workflow_loader.py scans ~/.config/kanboard/workflows/ for .py files and packages (dirs with __init__.py)
workflow_loader.py uses importlib.util to load modules, inspects for BaseWorkflow subclasses
workflow_loader.py returns list of instantiated workflow objects
main.py calls workflow.register_commands(cli) for each discovered workflow during startup
Graceful handling when workflow directory does not exist (no error, empty list)
Graceful handling when a workflow file fails to load (log warning, skip, continue)
CLI: kanboard workflow list — shows name and description of all discovered workflows
Stub workflow group in main.py replaced with real import/logic
All public classes and methods have docstrings and full type hints
Unit tests: loader discovers valid workflows, skips invalid files, handles missing directory
CLI tests: workflow list command shows output correctly
userStories.notes: Zero bundled workflows (ADR-11). Task 41 (example workflow) is in a separate repository and out of scope for this PRD.

userStories.title: Milestone 3 comprehensive test suite
userStories.description: Ensure all Milestone 3 SDK resource modules and CLI command groups have thorough test coverage. Fill coverage gaps, add missing error-path tests, cross-format output tests, and network-failure tests for all new resource modules. Target ≥90% on src/kanboard/resources/.
acceptanceCriteria: pytest --cov=src/kanboard/resources reports ≥90% coverage across all resource modules
Error path tests for every new M3 resource: KanboardNotFoundError, KanboardAPIError, KanboardConnectionError
CLI tests verify all 4 output formats (table, json, csv, quiet) for at least one command per new group
CLI tests verify --yes confirmation required for all destructive commands in M3
Empty result tests: list commands render cleanly when API returns []/{}
Network failure tests for all new M3 SDK resources (KanboardConnectionError)
All new test files follow existing conventions (conftest fixtures, pytest-httpx, CliRunner)
ruff check passes, pytest passes with all tests green
userStories.notes: Closes the milestone. Run coverage before marking done.
